REAL VEGAS v8 — deeper wash per Paolo tune (V7 blessed + superseded)

These aren't random streets anymore: each block is a REAL cell from the canonical 96x96 valley (seed 12345), generated from that cell's own seed through the bridge (7/7 law tests). District picks the recipe: the Strip runs 3 lanes with the max-3 sidewalks your law allows, downtown runs busy 2s, the suburb is a quiet 1+1. Quality drives the decay: lower-quality cells carry more wrecks. Same cell = same block, forever.
[V8-0] CENTER-TURN ARTERIAL — second wash (deeper dull)
